meta.title: MeriGauMata - Honoring the Mother, Nurturing Your Life
meta.description: Dedicated to the rescue, rehabilitation, and lifetime care of cows. Join our mission through donations and community engagement.
meta.keywords: merigaumata, organic, pure, natural, cow rescue, cow welfare, gau seva, donate for cows, sustainable gau shala

myOrders.title: My Sacred Acquisitions
myOrders.noOrdersDesc: Your acquisition log is currently a clean slate. Explore our collection and find something worthy of your sanctuary.

about.goal2Desc: Launch comprehensive education programs in 100+ schools and colleges to raise awareness about cow welfare, traditional knowledge, and sustainable practices.
about.subtitle: Dedicated to the protection, care, and welfare of cows through compassionate action and community engagement
about.impactSubtitle: Our journey is measured by the lives we touch and the community we build together.
about.dedicatedSubtitle: Dedicated to the protection, care and welfare of cows through compassionate action and community participation.
about.goalsSubtitle: Building a better tomorrow for cow welfare
about.goal4Desc: Deploy 10 mobile veterinary rescue units across rural areas to provide immediate care and rescue operations for distressed cattle.
about.whatDoYouThink: What Do You Think About Us?
about.teamSubtitle: Passionate individuals dedicated to cow welfare
about.missionText: To rescue, rehabilitate, and provide lifetime care for abandoned and injured cows while promoting awareness about the importance of cow welfare in our society. We strive to create a sustainable model of cow protection that combines traditional wisdom with modern veterinary science.
about.title: About Us
about.goal3Desc: Establish a specialized training center for veterinarians focusing on bovine healthcare, combining modern medicine with traditional Ayurvedic treatments.
about.joinUsSubtitle: Together we can make a lasting difference in cow welfare
about.feedbackSubtitle: Your feedback helps us improve and inspires others to join our cause. Share your experience with our community.
about.visionText: A world where every cow lives with dignity, free from suffering, and where communities recognize and honor the sacred bond between humans and these gentle beings. We envision establishing centers of excellence in cow care across the nation.
about.goal1Desc: Increase our capacity to care for 1,000+ cows by 2026 with state-of-the-art facilities including advanced medical units and natural grazing areas.
